leadText: The Suite Key (Japanese: ルームキー Room Key) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Suite Key was lost by a girl at Hotel Grand Lake . It can be located using the Dowsing Machine and returned to its owner, allowing her to enter her suite. As a reward, the girl will give the player a Lava Cookie D P BD SP / White Flute Pt .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method D P Pt BD SP Route 213 (immediately northwest of the northern reception entrance of Hotel Grand Lake )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A key to one of the suites at the luxury hotel by a lake. For some odd reason, it often disappears. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A key to one of the suites at a certain luxury hotel by a lake. For some odd reason, it often disappears.
